title: RSH Nominations and Remuneration Committee minutes 2025
body: "The Nominations and Remuneration Committee (formerly the Nominations and Governance Committee) is an advisory body which exercises governance functions. It comprises between 2 and 4 members appointed by the Board of RSH. The Committee meets at least once a year, or as required, at appropriate intervals.  Minutes for this committee are available from April 2023.  RSH Board minutes from October 2018 and the Audit and Risk Assurance Committee are also available on the minutes page.  "

taxons.title: Housing for older and vulnerable people
